title: The Forsaken Are Not Where We Left Them
theme: the Forsaken faction (still locked at this point) leaves traces in unexpected locations
worldEvent: in Drowned Orchard, a small ring of stones appears overnight; the Forsaken's mark, but they aren't supposed to be active
narratorPromptFragment: The current world-chapter is BOOK III, CHAPTER 3: THE FORSAKEN ARE NOT WHERE WE LEFT THEM. A small ring of stones appeared in Drowned Orchard overnight — the mark of the Forsaken faction, who shouldn't be active in the world yet. People who walk past the ring report a quiet that follows them home. Branch IV (which can unlock the Forsaken) is approaching. Reference the ring of stones, the quiet, and a sense of being noticed by something that hasn't introduced itself.
